creator: seanmeu@protonmail.com
text:
I was thinking about using the debug tool with Firefox to see what the problem was. Unfortunately, the hard drive on my system failed; therefore, I will not be able to continue troubleshooting this issue. Now I wonder if this issue was caused by the hard drive starting to fail.  :-/

Oh well. Feel free to close the case. I will reopen it or create a new one if I ever encounter this issue again.
